---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false
---
# About Me

I am **Sena Sivrikaya**, a senior Industrial Engineering student at **Hacettepe University** in Ankara, Türkiye.

My academic interests focus on **data analytics, optimization, operations research, and decision-making under uncertainty**. I am especially interested in how analytical methods can be used to understand, model, and improve complex systems.

# Education

- **B.S. in Industrial Engineering**, Hacettepe University, Türkiye, 2022 - ongoing  
  GPA: 3.64 / 4.00

# Work Experience

## Employments

1. **Philip Morris International**, Integrated Business Planning (IBP) Long-Term Intern (Part-Time), 2025 - ongoing

## Internships

1. **Turkish Airlines**, Digitalisation & Continuous Improvement Intern, 2025

2. **Jotform**, Data Analyst Intern, 2024

3. **TotalEnergies**, Supply & Trade Intern, 2024

# Projects

1.  **mpci: Python Package for Multivariate Process Capability Indices**\
    Co-author and lead developer of an open-source Python library implementing multivariate process capability indices.

2.  **AI-Powered Personalized Leadership Development System (ROKETSAN)**\
    Developed a stochastic and optimization-based system combining Structural Equation Modeling and Markov Chains to recommend personalized training programs.


# Competencies

Python, R, Git/GitHub, Quarto, SQL, Optimization Modeling, Data Analytics

# Hobbies

Reading about technology and data science, hiking, traveling, and exploring new research areas in analytics and optimization.

# Resume

You can download my resume here.

[Download CV](cv.pdf){.cv-button}
